reason: Address Greptile follow-up on npm store safety, local read behavior, package risk scoring, generated catalog drift, and custom registry intelligence behavior.

changes.summary: Whitelist domain tables before constructing ListIDs table queries, fix last_week upsert value ordering, and reject unsafe ResolveByName JSON field names before constructing json_extract paths.
Open existing local stores with OpenReadOnly for local read paths.

Return npm downloads lookup failures instead of silently dropping them, surface npm deprecation metadata in package risk scoring, skip public download lookups for non-default registries unless a downloads API override is configured, and avoid scoring low-download risk when download counts are unknown.
Add regressions for last_week versions_id storage, ListIDs fallback behavior with untrusted resource names, and ResolveByName JSON-field validation.

Add regressions for package summary download lookup errors, deprecated-package risk signals, custom-registry package summaries without public download counts, and custom-registry risk scores that must not emit false low-download signals.

validated_outcome: go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., govulncheck ./..., publish validate, verify-publish-package, verify-skill, and live risk smoke rerun after patch
